title: arenaria fendleri var. loisiae
intro: Arenaria fendleri var. loisiae, also known as Loisia's sandwort, is a rare and unique variety of the Arenaria fendleri plant, which belongs to the carnation family and is native to the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Loisia's sandwort include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Arenaria fendleri var. loisiae often involve infusing the plant in hot water or oil to create a tea or tincture that can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
